title: Custom Legendary Maces
body:
Seven legendary maces, each with unique abilities! Craft these powerful weapons and unleash their devastating powers. Each mace can only be crafted once per server, making them truly legendary!

7 Unique Legendary Maces - Each with 2-3 special abilities

One-of-a-kind Crafting - Each mace can only be crafted once per server

Custom Abilities - Stuns, dashes, earthquakes, time manipulation, dragon summoning, and more!

World Event Broadcasts - When a legendary mace is crafted, everyone knows!

Full Configurability - Cooldowns, messages, and more in config.yml

Particle Effects - Stunning visual effects for all abilities

No Dependencies - Works standalone on any Paper/Spigot 1.21.1 server

🎮 The Maces
🌪️ Wind Mace
"Infused with the fury of the storm"

Ability	Effect
Shift + Right Click	Launch yourself 20 blocks into the air
Right Click	Stun all players within 10 blocks for 3 seconds
Shift + Left Click	Dash forward rapidly + Speed II for 5 seconds
Passive	5% cooldown reduction with Flow Armor (30% with full trim)
💪 Strength Mace
"Raw power incarnate"

Ability	Effect
Right Click	Fair Duel - All attacks become critical hits and stun shields for 30 seconds
Passive	Infinite Strength I
🌍 Earth Mace
"The ground trembles at your feet"

Ability	Effect
Shift + Right Click	Earthquake - Massive area damage in a 10-block radius
Shift + Left Click	Become completely immune to all damage for 5 seconds
Passive	Infinite Resistance I
❄️ Glacial Mace
"Frozen in eternal ice"

Ability	Effect
Shift + Right Click	Ice Domain - Creates a 20x20 freezing zone. Players inside receive slowness every 5 seconds and take 1.5x damage
Right Click	Freeze the player you hit for 5 seconds
Passive	Freeze attackers for 0.5 seconds when damaged
🌌 Void Mace
"From the void, it calls"

Ability	Effect
Shift + Right Click	Void Domain - Become invisible inside the zone. Nearby players' armor loses 20 durability every 2 seconds
Passive	Critical hits reduce target's armor durability by 25
⏳ Time Mace
"Master of moments"

Ability	Effect
Shift + Right Click	Time Portal - Teleport back to your starting point after 15 seconds. Upon return, fire a devastating time beam in the direction you're looking
Cooldown	90 seconds (configurable)
🐉 End Mace
"Dragon's fury, yours to command"

Ability	Effect
Shift + Right Click	Dragon Tamer - Summon a rideable Ender Dragon for 20 seconds
Right Click	Dragon's Bite - Shoot an Ender Dragon fireball
Shift + Left Click	Summon two Ender Dragons that attack players you hit (20 seconds)
Passive	10% chance to summon 3 Endermen when hit by a player
🔧 Installation
Download the JAR file

Place it in your server's plugins folder

Restart your server

Configure plugins/LegendaryMaces/config.yml if desired

Enjoy!

Requirements:

Minecraft 1.21.1

Paper/Spigot server (or any fork)

📋 Commands
Command	Description	Permission
/lm list	List all legendary maces	legendarymaces.use
/lm info	Plugin information	legendarymaces.use
/lm give <mace> [player]	Give a mace to a player	legendarymaces.admin
/lm reload	Reload configuration	legendarymaces.admin

⚙️ Configuration
yaml
# Fully customizable:
- Cooldowns for each ability
- Broadcast messages
- Zone durations
- Effect strengths
- Flow Armor buff percentages

🎯 Why Choose Legendary Maces?
✅ Unique gameplay - Each mace offers a completely different playstyle

✅ Balanced - Carefully tuned cooldowns and effects

✅ Performance-friendly - Optimized code, no lag

✅ Customizable - Change everything to fit your server

✅ No dependencies - Just drop and play!

✅ Active development - Regular updates and bug fixes

Thank you guys for all the support ur giving for the project.
